version.description: The current version of the object. See the [versioning guide](https://docs.gusto.com/embedded-payroll/docs/versioning#object-layer) for information on how to use this field.

filing_status.description: Determines which tax return form an individual will use. One of: Single, Married, Head of Household, Exempt from withholding.

extra_withholding.description: Additional amount to be withheld from each paycheck.

two_jobs.description: If there are only two jobs (e.g., you and your spouse each have a job), set to true.

dependents_amount.description: Amount for dependents; a dependent entitles the taxpayer to claim a dependency exemption.

deductions.description: Deductions other than the standard deduction to reduce withholding.

w4_data_type.description: The version of the W4 form. Only rev_2020_w4 is accepted for updates.

federal_withholding_allowance.description: Only applicable when w4_data_type is 'pre_2020_w4' (pre-2020 W4 forms are deprecated for updates).

additional_withholding.description: Only applicable when w4_data_type is 'pre_2020_w4' (pre-2020 W4 forms are deprecated for updates).
